title: centaurium candollei
intro: Centaurium candollei, also known as Chinese centaury, is a perennial plant native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. Centaurium candollei can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules, making it accessible for use in various forms, including as a dietary supplement.
